title: local_inv_controls_v1 — per-(tested chrom × local inversion) covariate matrix
description: Typed payload for the interchromosomal page's covariate adjustment. One row per (tested_chrom, local inversion on that chrom). Consumer groups by tested_chrom to get the per-chrom covariate set for the regression. Length_bp is derived as end_bp - start_bp + 1 when the producer omits it. Frequencies outside [0, 1] coerce to null. Required identifiers (tested_chrom, inversion_id, start_bp) drop rows missing any of the three.

tested_chrom.description: Chromosome being tested in the interchromosomal regression; covariates for this chrom regress out its local inversions.

inversion_chrom.description: Chromosome the inversion sits on. For true local controls, equals tested_chrom; producer can include cross-chrom rows but they are ignored by the consumer.

length_bp.description: end_bp - start_bp + 1; derived by extractor when omitted.

frequency.description: Cohort allele frequency. Out-of-range values coerce to null.

n_het_carriers.description: Parents heterozygous for this local inv — the canonical covariate driving the regression adjustment.

n_carriers.description: Optional: parents with at least one alt allele (het + homB).

freq_min_filter.description: Optional: threshold applied at build time (provenance).

n_controls.description: Total row count after coercion + identifier drop.

n_chroms_with_controls.description: Chroms with at least one local control after coercion. Drives the interchromosomal status badge.
